raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Golden State Innovation Act of 2021 aims to restore the Research and Development Tax Credit and Net Operating Loss deduction for Life Sciences companies in California.",
    "Reinstating the R&D Tax Credit and NOL for Life Sciences companies will help double the number of Life Science jobs in California.",
    "California is known as a leader in Life Sciences innovation.",
    "Venture capitalists invested $6.5 billion into California Life Sciences businesses in 2019.",
    "California's Life Sciences ecosystem fosters academic research, venture capital investment, and the development of industry leaders.",
    "The investment by larger companies on R&D in California contributes to the development of innovative products, including medicines and genomic sequencing applications.",
    "Reinstating California's Life Sciences research and development tax credit will bolster biomedical innovation in the state.",
    "Highly-skilled research and development teams quickly produced anti-COVID vaccines.",
    "California's ability to spur new and creative innovations in health is dependent on continued research and development.",
    "The Life Sciences industry provides well-paying jobs and aims to save and improve lives through research and development."
  ]
}
```
